overall.description: A smooth cinematic drone shot traversing a luxurious modern rooftop terrace in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The camera glides from a shaded pergola lounge past palm trees and an infinity pool to reveal a panoramic golden-hour view of the futuristic metropolis, before turning to showcase the building's sleek contemporary architecture and outdoor dining area.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop lounge under metal pergola

agents.ego_description: slowly gliding through the shaded lounge area past modern outdoor furniture

entered.detail: dark metal slatted roof structure providing partial shade over the lounge area
modern sectional sofa with bright red upholstery and white cushions
low-profile wooden deck chairs with white pillows arranged in rows
polished dark wooden decking covering the terrace surface
transparent glass safety barrier at the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a modern metal pergola shading a luxurious rooftop lounge. Red sofas and wooden lounge chairs with white cushions are arranged on polished wooden decking. The camera moves smoothly forward, with palm trees visible in the distance beyond the glass railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop terrace with infinity pool

events.description: exits the covered pergola into direct sunlight on the open terrace

agents.ego_description: gliding along the wooden deck past lounge chairs toward the infinity pool and terrace edge

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the terrace edge against the sky
rectangular reflecting pool with dark water surface at the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the pergola into bright golden-hour sunlight, the scene opens onto a spacious terrace with tall palm trees and a sleek infinity pool reflecting the sky. The camera continues forward along the wooden deck, approaching the glass railing with the futuristic city skyline becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation deck with panoramic city views

events.description: reaches the terrace edge revealing the full panoramic view of the futuristic city skyline and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: pausing at the terrace edge to take in the sweeping view of the metropolis and surrounding landscape

entered.detail: futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers and high-rise buildings of Night City visible in the distance
hazy mountains forming the backdrop behind the city

segments.scene_description: At the terrace edge, the camera reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of a sprawling futuristic city with towering skyscrapers against a mountain backdrop, bathed in warm golden-hour light. The infinity pool passes out of view as the camera continues along the glass railing, with palm trees now lining the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern rooftop dining area under architectural canopy

events.description: turns toward the building facade revealing outdoor dining area and modern architecture
moves into the shadow of the overhead pergola structure, creating dramatic light patterns

agents.ego_description: turning to examine the building's sleek architectural features and covered walkway

entered.detail: sleek contemporary building with dark metal panels, glass balconies, and geometric overhangs
large beige patio umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables
dark wooden slatted roof structure creating striped shadow patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the building to reveal a sophisticated outdoor dining area with large umbrellas and the sleek modern facade of the structure. Moving under an overhead pergola, the lighting shifts to dramatic shadows cast by the wooden slats above, with the city skyline now visible in the far right background as the tour of the rooftop concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, intimate rooftop lounge into a vast, sun-drenched panoramic vista of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath a modern metal pergola among red sofas and polished wooden decking, gliding forward as the shade gives way to bright golden-hour sunlight. As the camera emerges onto the open terrace, the scene expands to reveal tall palm trees and a sleek infinity pool reflecting the sky before reaching the glass railing. The view then opens into a breathtaking panorama of towering skyscrapers and distant mountains bathed in warm light, with the pool receding as the camera tracks along the perimeter. Finally, the perspective turns back toward the building to showcase a sophisticated outdoor dining area, moving under another pergola where the lighting shifts into dramatic shadows cast by wooden slats.
